title: CleanWorkOrderDataset
description: Clean work order dataset produced by normalizing ERP maintenance history. Maps to the Maintenance_Work_Order ontology object.

wo_id.description: Primary key - unique work order identifier, sourced from maintenance history (wo_id)

transformer_id.description: Foreign key referencing Transformer - sourced from maintenance history (transformer_id)

priority.description: Work order priority, derived from Risk_Score (Critical if >= 90, High if >= 70)

status.description: Current work order status managed by Work_Order_Service

assigned_crew.description: Assigned maintenance crew, required on approval. Null until work order is approved.

created_timestamp.description: Work order creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format, system generated

erp_reference_id.description: ERP system reference identifier, set on ERP confirmation. Null until ERP writeback succeeds.
